tasks.subject: Task 1: assignAccordion.ts — 순수 구조 계산 + 테스트
tasks.description:
**Goal:** top-level 블록 분류 배열 → 라벨 디바이더 멤버 테이블(ord/group/소유 리스트 인덱스/list-bearing) + 그룹별 멤버 수를 내는 순수 함수.

**Files:**
- Create: app/src/lib/editor/labeledDivider/assignAccordion.ts
- Test: app/tests/unit/editor/labeledFoldAccordion.test.ts

**Verify:** cd app && npx vitest run tests/unit/editor/labeledFoldAccordion.test.ts

```json:metadata
{"files": ["app/src/lib/editor/labeledDivider/assignAccordion.ts", "app/tests/unit/editor/labeledFoldAccordion.test.ts"], "verifyCommand": "cd app && npx vitest run tests/unit/editor/labeledFoldAccordion.test.ts", "acceptanceCriteria": ["divider+list → isListBearing true, listIndices=consecutive run", "divider+non-list → not list-bearing, excluded", "--- increments group", "ordinal counts all dividers doc-order", "headerCount skips; memberCountByGroup correct"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: labeledFoldStore.ts — per-guid 영속 + 테스트
tasks.description:
**Goal:** 포커스된 ordinal 집합을 per-guid localStorage(tomboy.labeledFold.<guid>)에 저장/로드. hrFoldStore 패턴 복제.

**Files:**
- Create: app/src/lib/editor/labeledDivider/labeledFoldStore.ts
- Test: app/tests/unit/editor/labeledFoldStore.test.ts

**Verify:** cd app && npx vitest run tests/unit/editor/labeledFoldStore.test.ts

```json:metadata
{"files": ["app/src/lib/editor/labeledDivider/labeledFoldStore.ts", "app/tests/unit/editor/labeledFoldStore.test.ts"], "verifyCommand": "cd app && npx vitest run tests/unit/editor/labeledFoldStore.test.ts", "acceptanceCriteria": ["unknown guid → empty", "round-trip + per-guid scope", "empty set removes key", "corrupt JSON / null guid → empty, no throw"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: labeledFoldPlugin.ts — ProseMirror 플러그인 + 테스트
tasks.description:
**Goal:** 포커스 상태·데코(위젯 버튼+리스트 숨김)·토글 순환·doc reconcile·split-inert PM 플러그인. 토글은 버튼만(handleClick 없음).

**Files:**
- Create: app/src/lib/editor/labeledDivider/labeledFoldPlugin.ts
- Test: app/tests/unit/editor/labeledFoldPlugin.test.ts

**Verify:** cd app && npx vitest run tests/unit/editor/labeledFoldPlugin.test.ts

```json:metadata
{"files": ["app/src/lib/editor/labeledDivider/labeledFoldPlugin.ts", "app/tests/unit/editor/labeledFoldPlugin.test.ts"], "verifyCommand": "cd app && npx vitest run tests/unit/editor/labeledFoldPlugin.test.ts", "acceptanceCriteria": ["default: buttons only on ≥2-member groups, 0 hidden", "<2-member group: no button, ignores toggle", "focus hides group siblings only", "toggle open member cycles to next (wraps)", "toggle closed member jumps", "inert while hrSplit active", "docChanged prunes invalid ordinals"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: TomboyEditor.svelte 배선 + CSS
tasks.description:
**Goal:** 새 플러그인 Extension 등록, 노트 로드 시 포커스 reseed(두 지점), onChange 영속, 버튼·숨김 CSS 추가.

**Files:**
- Modify: app/src/lib/editor/TomboyEditor.svelte

**Verify:** cd app && npm run check (0 errors) + 브라우저 수동

```json:metadata
{"files": ["app/src/lib/editor/TomboyEditor.svelte"], "verifyCommand": "cd app && npm run check", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Extension registered after tomboyLabeledDivider", "both reseed blocks dispatch labeledFold replace", "onChange persists via saveFocusedOrdinals", "CSS for fold-btn + fold-hidden added", "npm run check 0 errors"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: 설정 → 가이드 카드
tasks.description:
**Goal:** 설정 → 가이드 → 편집 탭에 제목 수평선 리스트 아코디언 카드 추가. CLAUDE.md 필수.

**Files:**
- Modify: app/src/routes/settings/+page.svelte

**Verify:** cd app && npm run check (0 errors) + 브라우저 노출 확인

```json:metadata
{"files": ["app/src/routes/settings/+page.svelte"], "verifyCommand": "cd app && npm run check", "acceptanceCriteria": ["new guide-card in editor subtab", "explains format/member/group/cycle/persistence/split-exclusion", "follows existing card pattern", "npm run check passes"]}
```
